moments.title: Wimbledon heats up
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships continue, with Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Third Round matches today, leading into the decisive second week.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! Wimbledon is in full swing with today's Third Round action. Who are you backing for the trophy this year? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Weekend Tennis
angles.copy: Perfect weekend plans: settle in for some world-class tennis! Wimbledon's Third Round is serving up some unmissable matches today.

moments.title: British Grand Prix concludes
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone wraps up its thrilling weekend of Formula 1 action tomorrow, July 5th, following practice and qualifying.

angles.name: Race Day Anticipation
angles.copy: Engines revving for the British Grand Prix finale! Who's taking the checkered flag at Silverstone tomorrow? #F1 #BritishGP

angles.name: Weekend of Speed
angles.copy: What a weekend of speed! The British Grand Prix concludes tomorrow. Catch all the final laps and drama from Silverstone. #Formula1

moments.title: Pride in London takes over
moments.blurb: Pride in London celebrates its annual event today, July 4th, with parades, parties, and protests across the capital to champion LGBTQIA+ visibility and equality.

angles.name: Celebration & Support
angles.copy: London is vibrant today for Pride in London! Celebrating love, diversity, and equality across the capital. #PrideInLondon

angles.name: Community Focus
angles.copy: Happy Pride! Sending love to everyone celebrating Pride in London today. A powerful day for community and visibility. #LondonPride

moments.title: Guilfest brings music to Guildford
moments.blurb: Guilfest returns to Stoke Park in Guildford this weekend, July 4-5, featuring headliners like Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental (DJ set), and The Lottery Winners.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Guilfest is LIVE this weekend! Who's heading to Stoke Park for Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental, and more? #Guilfest

angles.name: Weekend Music
angles.copy: If you're in Guildford, Guilfest is the place to be! Two days of great music kicking off today. What's your top act to see?

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival underway
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival continues this weekend, July 3-5, at Glynde Place, East Sussex, with performances from De La Soul, Loyle Carner, The Temptations, and Sister Sledge.

angles.name: Jazz & Soul Weekend
angles.copy: Groovy vibes at Love Supreme Jazz Festival! De La Soul, The Temptations, Sister Sledge and more are bringing the funk to East Sussex this weekend. #LoveSupreme

angles.name: Festival Highlights
angles.copy: Who's soaking up the sun and sounds at Love Supreme? What's been your highlight so far from the festival? #SoulMusic

moments.title: Monmouth goes Medieval
moments.blurb: The Monmouth Medieval Festival transforms the Welsh town into a lively celebration with reenactments and markets this weekend, July 4-5.

angles.name: Local Welsh Event
angles.copy: Step back in time! The Monmouth Medieval Festival is on this weekend, bringing history to life in Wales. Who's going? #Monmouth #Wales

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Swords, markets, and medieval fun for all ages at the Monmouth Medieval Festival today and tomorrow! #FamilyFunWales

moments.title: Happy 31st to Post Malone
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone, who turns 31 today! What's your favourite track from the genre-bending artist? #PostMalone

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday today! From 'White Iverson' to global superstar. What's his best song? #MusicBirthday

moments.title: John Waite turns 74
moments.blurb: English singer-songwriter John Waite, known for 'Missing You' and fronting The Babys and Bad English, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Classic
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary John Waite! 'Missing You' is still an absolute classic. What's your favourite of his tracks? #JohnWaite

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: A rock icon celebrates today! John Waite, frontman of The Babys and Bad English, is 74. Tune in for some of his greatest hits!

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, celebrates his 76th birthday tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: Anticipate Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Huey Lewis turns 76! Get ready to celebrate with some 'Power of Love' and other classics. #HueyLewis

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe Huey Lewis turns 76 tomorrow? Still one of the coolest voices from the 80s! What's your go-to Huey Lewis & The News hit?

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: RZA, the influential leader of Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Wu-Tang Clan forever! Happy 57th birthday tomorrow to the one and only RZA. What's your favourite Wu-Tang track? #RZA

angles.name: Producer Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the mastermind behind so many iconic beats! RZA turns 57 tomorrow. The influence is undeniable. #HipHop

moments.title: John Keeble is 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: On Monday, Spandau Ballet's John Keeble turns 67! Get ready to 'Gold' up your Monday with some New Romantic classics. #SpandauBallet

angles.name: Music History
angles.copy: Celebrating John Keeble's 67th birthday on July 6th. The beat behind so many Spandau Ballet hits! What's your favourite?

moments.title: 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Birthday
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your ultimate 50 Cent anthem? #50Cent

angles.name: Artist Influence
angles.copy: Still making waves! 50 Cent celebrates his 51st on July 6th. A true force in music and culture. #MusicBirthday

moments.title: Llangollen Eisteddfod begins
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod, a major celebration of music and culture, commences on July 7th in North Wales, welcoming competitors from around the world.

angles.name: Welsh Cultural Event
angles.copy: Get ready for a week of incredible music and culture! The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod kicks off in North Wales on July 7th. #LlangollenEisteddfod

angles.name: International Showcase
angles.copy: North Wales welcomes the world! The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod starts Tuesday, showcasing diverse talent and traditions. #WelshEvents

moments.title: Hampton Court Garden Festival
moments.blurb: The RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival, the world's largest flower festival, runs from July 8-12, offering stunning floral displays and workshops.

angles.name: Summer Event
angles.copy: Green fingers assemble! The RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival begins July 8th. Get ready for breathtaking displays and gardening inspiration. #RHS

angles.name: Palace Event
angles.copy: A floral spectacle awaits! The world's largest flower festival at Hampton Court Palace kicks off on Wednesday. Who's planning a visit? #HamptonCourt

moments.title: Trying S5 on Apple TV+
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the acclaimed British comedy-drama 'Trying' premieres globally on Apple TV+ on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: TV Premiere
angles.copy: More laughs and heartwarming moments are coming! Season 5 of the brilliant British comedy 'Trying' lands on Apple TV+ this Wednesday, July 8th. #Trying

angles.name: Binge Watch
angles.copy: New TV alert! Get ready to binge the new season of 'Trying' on Apple TV+ from July 8th. Who's excited for more Nikki and Jason? #BritishComedy

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes place from July 10-12 in Moseley Park, featuring a diverse line-up of innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham Festival
angles.copy: Birmingham, get ready to groove! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival hits Moseley Park from July 10-12. Who are you hoping to see? #MostlyJazzFunkSoul

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Looking ahead to a soulful weekend! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is next week. Time to plan your schedule! #MusicFestival

moments.title: Mavis Staples turns 87
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples celebrates her 87th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: An absolute icon turns 87 next week! Happy early birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples. Her voice is pure gold. #MavisStaples

angles.name: Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating the living legend Mavis Staples, who turns 87 on July 10th. What's your favourite song by her or The Staple Singers?

moments.title: Neil Tennant is 72
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead vocalist and keyboardist for the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: It's a big one next week for Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys, turning 72! Get ready to play 'West End Girls' on repeat. #PetShopBoys

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to Neil Tennant, who turns 72 on July 10th! What's your favourite Pet Shop Boys hit? #80sMusic

moments.title: The Westies premieres on MGM+
moments.blurb: The new crime drama 'The Westies', set in 1980s Hell's Kitchen, premieres on MGM+ on Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: New Drama Alert
angles.copy: For fans of gritty crime dramas: 'The Westies', set in 1980s Hell's Kitchen, drops on MGM+ this Sunday! Who's watching? #TheWesties

angles.name: Weekend TV
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge? 'The Westies' premieres July 12th on MGM+. Get ready for some serious 80s organised crime! #NewTV

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second 'After the Altar' special for Love is Blind: UK Season 2 premieres globally on Netflix on Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: The pods are back! Well, after the pods. 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday! Who's ready for the drama? #LoveIsBlindUK

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Catch up with your favourite Love is Blind: UK couples (and ex-couples!) as 'After the Altar' Season 2 arrives on Netflix on July 12th. #RealityTV

moments.title: The Open practice rounds begin
moments.blurb: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days from Sunday, July 12th, ahead of the main tournament play later in the week.

angles.name: Golf Build-up
angles.copy: Get ready, golf fans! The Open Championship practice rounds begin this Sunday at Royal Birkdale. The build-up to a major is always exciting! #TheOpen

angles.name: Major Golf Starts
angles.copy: The 154th Open is almost here! Practice days kick off July 12th at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug this year?
